findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter.isValid - HTTP request methods used and contains checks
 * @description Find what methods InvalidRequestFilter.isValid calls on the HTTP request 
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-isvalid-request-methods
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "isValid" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "isAccessAllowed" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsInvalidNotEncodedValues" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsInvalidEncodedValues"
  )
select mc, "InvalidRequestFilter." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " calls " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() on " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: isValid may use getRequestURI (raw/encoded) vs getServletPath (decoded) creating inconsistency

/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter containsTraversal, containsSemicolon, containsBackslash details
 * @description Find what methods these containsX methods call and what URI extraction method is used
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-contains-traversal-detail
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsTraversal" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsSemicolon" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsBackslash" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsNonAsciiCharacters" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "isValid"
  )
select mc, "InvalidRequestFilter." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " -> " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() on " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: containsTraversal may not detect all URL-encoded traversal sequences like %252e%252e

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name String literals used in containsTraversal and path validation methods
 * @description Find what specific string patterns InvalidRequestFilter checks for traversal
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-traversal-patterns
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from StringLiteral sl
where
  sl.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter")
  and not sl.getEnclosingCallable() instanceof StaticInitializer
select sl, "InvalidRequestFilter." + sl.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " uses string: '" + sl.getValue() + "' at line " + sl.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Missing traversal pattern checks in InvalidRequestFilter allows bypass

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter isAccessAllowed - what arguments are passed to isValid
 * @description Find what request URI fields/methods are passed as arguments to isValid from isAccessAllowed
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-isvalid-args
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find the argument expressions to isValid calls in isAccessAllowed
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("isValid") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "isAccessAllowed"
select mc, "isValid call at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " with arg: " + mc.getArgument(0).toString()
findings.hypothesis: isValid receives getRequestURI (raw) or getPathWithinApplication (normalized) - affects bypass potential

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter isNormalized method - what does it check
 * @description Find what string operations isNormalized performs to understand if %252e bypasses work
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-isnormalized-impl
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "isNormalized" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsTraversal" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsOnlyPrintableAsciiCharacters"
  )
select mc, "InvalidRequestFilter." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " -> " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "(" + mc.getArgument(0) + ") at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: isNormalized checks specific string patterns that can be bypassed with double encoding

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter containsTraversal - full expression tree
 * @description Get ALL expressions including arguments passed to isNormalized and noneMatch in containsTraversal
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-traversal-full
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from Expr e
where
  e.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  e.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "containsTraversal" and
  (
    e instanceof MethodCall or
    e instanceof VarAccess or
    e instanceof StringLiteral or
    e instanceof FieldAccess
  )
select e, "containsTraversal: [" + e.toString() + "] type=" + e.getType().getName() + " at line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: containsTraversal checks may have gaps for URL-encoded traversal sequences like %252e%252e or using scheme prefixes

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path matching uses normalized path while InvalidRequestFilter checks only raw URI patterns
 * @description The filter chain resolver normalizes paths resolving /../ sequences, while InvalidRequestFilter
 *              only checks for literal %2e, %2f patterns and raw /../ - a bypass could exist via double encoding
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-path-normalization-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 *       external/cwe/cwe-706
 */

import java

// Find the asymmetry: PathMatchingFilterChainResolver uses WebUtils.getPathWithinApplication (normalize)
// while InvalidRequestFilter.isAccessAllowed checks getRequestURI() directly
// Look for cases where path normalization (normalize/cleanPath) is called for routing/matching
// but the security check uses a different path
from MethodCall normalizeCall, MethodCall validationCall
where
  // normalizeCall: normalize called for filter chain resolution
  normalizeCall.getMethod().hasName("getPathWithinApplication") and
  normalizeCall.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils") and
  normalizeCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter.mgt", "PathMatchingFilterChainResolver") and
  // validationCall: getRequestURI used in security check  
  validationCall.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI") and
  validationCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter")
select normalizeCall, "ASYMMETRY: FilterChainResolver uses normalized path (WebUtils.getPathWithinApplication at line " + 
  normalizeCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + ") while InvalidRequestFilter checks raw getRequestURI() at line " + 
  validationCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - these may resolve paths differently"
findings.hypothesis: Asymmetry between path used for filter chain resolution (normalized) and path validated by InvalidRequestFilter (raw URI) enables path traversal bypass

message.text: ASYMMETRY: FilterChainResolver uses normalized path (WebUtils.getPathWithinApplication at line 187) while InvalidRequestFilter checks raw getRequestURI() at line 78 - these may resolve paths differently

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name String startsWith used for path containment check
 * @description Using String.startsWith for path containment checks is unsafe as it can be bypassed
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-weak-path-containment
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String") and
  // Check if this is used in a path-related context
  exists(Variable v |
    mc.getQualifier() = v.getAnAccess() and
    (
      v.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%path%") or
      v.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%uri%") or
      v.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%url%") or
      v.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%resource%") or
      v.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%file%") or
      v.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%dir%") or
      v.getName().toLowerCase().matches("%location%")
    )
  )
select mc, "String.startsWith used for path containment check - this can be bypassed without canonicalization first."
findings.hypothesis: String.startsWith used for path containment checks without proper canonicalization

/**
 * @name InvalidRequestFilter and path normalization analysis
 * @description Examine the InvalidRequestFilter to understand what path sequences it blocks
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-invalid-request-filter
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find string literal patterns used in path validation/blocking in InvalidRequestFilter
from StringLiteral sl, Method m
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter") and
  sl.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select sl, "String literal in InvalidRequestFilter method: " + m.getName() + " = '" + sl.getValue() + "'"

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name WebUtils path retrieval methods 
 * @description Examine how WebUtils extracts paths from HTTP requests
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-webutils-path
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022

import java

// Get all methods in WebUtils and their string literal usages
from Method m, StringLiteral sl
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils") and
  sl.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select m, "WebUtils." + m.getName() + " uses literal: '" + sl.getValue() + "' at line " + sl.getLocation().getStartLine()

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Path normalization and request path extraction in Shiro web layer
 * @description Analyze the ordering of path normalization vs security checks in AbstractShiroFilter and PathMatchingFilterChainResolver
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-path-normalize-order
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all calls to normalize, getRequestURI, getServletPath, getPathInfo in path-related classes
from MethodCall mc, RefType declType
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = declType and
  (
    declType.hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter.mgt", "PathMatchingFilterChainResolver") or
    declType.hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.servlet", "AbstractShiroFilter") or
    declType.hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils") or
    declType.hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "PathMatchingFilter")
  ) and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("normalize") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getRequestURI") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getServletPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getPathInfo") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getContextPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("getPathWithinApplication") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("decodeRequestString") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("decode") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("cleanPath") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isValid") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("isAccessAllowed")
  )
select mc, declType.getName() + "." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " calls " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Path normalization and filter check ordering may allow bypass

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Shiro InvalidRequestFilter containsInvalidRequest check details
 * @description Look at what method calls are in isInvalidRequest / containsInvalidRequest
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-invalid-request-checks
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Look at all field accesses and string literals in InvalidRequestFilter
from Field f
where
  f.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter", "InvalidRequestFilter")
select f, "Field in InvalidRequestFilter: " + f.getType().getName() + " " + f.getName() + " (line " + f.getLocation().getStartLine() + ")"
findings.hypothesis: InvalidRequestFilter fields reveal what checks are being performed

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name PathMatchingFilterChainResolver getPathWithinApplication - does it decode before matching?
 * @description Check if the path used for filter chain resolution is decoded (potentially bypassing InvalidRequestFilter)
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-decoded-path-chain-resolution
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 *       external/cwe/cwe-706
 */

import java

// Find calls in PathMatchingFilterChainResolver.getChain and related methods
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter.mgt", "PathMatchingFilterChainResolver") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "getChain"
select mc, "PathMatchingFilterChainResolver.getChain calls: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: getChain uses decoded/normalized path for filter resolution - potentially different from what InvalidRequestFilter checked

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name PathMatchingFilterChainResolver getPathWithinApplication - full implementation
 * @description Understand the path used for filter chain matching (this is what determines which security filters apply)
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning

 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find all calls in PathMatchingFilterChainResolver.getPathWithinApplication
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter.mgt", "PathMatchingFilterChainResolver") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "getPathWithinApplication"
select mc, "PathMatchingFilterChainResolver.getPathWithinApplication calls: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " on " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: The path used for chain resolution is decoded/normalized differently than what is checked by InvalidRequestFilter

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name WebUtils.getPathWithinApplication full call chain
 * @description What does getPathWithinApplication call - does it decode and normalize?
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-getpathwithinapp
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.util", "WebUtils") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "getPathWithinApplication" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "getRequestUri" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "decodeAndCleanUriString" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "normalize"
  )
select mc, "WebUtils." + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() + " calls " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " on " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Understanding path decode chain in WebUtils to identify bypass opportunities

/**

 * @description Understand the PathTraversalBlockMode enum values and how they affect traversal detection
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-traversal-block-mode
 * @tags security

 */

import java

// Find the PathTraversalBlockMode enum and all its usages
from RefType t
where
  t.getName() = "PathTraversalBlockMode"

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Shiro web filter chain - does InvalidRequestFilter come before PathMatchingFilter?
 * @description Check if InvalidRequestFilter is always applied before other filters in the chain
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity warning
 * @id java/shiro-filter-ordering
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Find where InvalidRequestFilter is registered in DefaultFilter enum or DefaultFilterChainManager
from Field f
where
  f.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter.mgt", "DefaultFilter")
select f, "DefaultFilter: " + f.getName() + " -> " + f.getType().getName() + " at line " + f.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Filter ordering may allow bypassing InvalidRequestFilter for certain request patterns

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractShiroFilter - does it apply InvalidRequestFilter before chain resolution?
 * @description Check if AbstractShiroFilter wraps the filter chain execution to ensure InvalidRequestFilter runs first
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/shiro-filter-not-default
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-022
 */

import java

// Check DefaultFilterChainManager - does it add invalidRequest filter by default?
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.apache.shiro.web.filter.mgt", "DefaultFilterChainManager") and
  (
    mc.getEnclosingCallable() instanceof Constructor or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "addDefaultFilters" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "createDefaultFilters" or
    mc.getEnclosingCallable().getName() = "addFilter"
  )
